message:
feat: redesign journal as day-by-day session timeline with styled conversations

- Rewrite journal view to query sessions directly instead of requiring
  LLM-generated journal_entries, showing a day-by-day timeline grouped
  by project with session links, time ranges, and git branches
- Create shared renderConversation() that parses **Speaker (HH:MM):**
  markdown format into styled chat message blocks with user/claude colors
- Update session detail view and /api/conversations HTMX endpoint to
  use the new conversation renderer instead of raw escaped text
- Add CSS for message blocks (.msg-user, .msg-claude) and session items;
  remove monospace/pre-wrap from .conversation container
